title: Regular Expression Extraction with Complex Pattern Matching
scenario: Write a prompt that extracts a list of phone numbers from a text document, using a regular expression that matches phone numbers in the format of '(123) 456-7890' or '123-456-7890' or '1234567890'. The document contains the following text: 'Call me at (123) 456-7890 or 123-456-7890 or 1234567890.' The prompt should generate a list of unique phone numbers.
constraints: Must use a regular expression to match phone numbers
Must handle different phone number formats
Must generate a list of unique phone numbers

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses a regular expression to match phone numbers and handles different phone number formats.
Verify that the generated list of phone numbers is accurate and contains no duplicates.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
